name: Holy Roman Empire Fast Feudal Men-at-Arms
author: RTSLytics

notes: Send all 6 starting villagers to sheep and keep producing villagers nonstop.
Scout the map to find sheep, gold, and your opponent's base.
Send 2 villagers to wood and build a Lumber Camp.
Build a House so you do not get housed early.
Send 2 villagers to gold and build a Mining Camp. You need gold for Men-at-Arms.
HRE villagers near a Town Center build faster, so keep them grouped when constructing.
Put new villagers on food to push for a fast Feudal Age.
Build a Mill on berries when your sheep start to run out.
With about 400 food and 200 wood, click up to the Feudal Age.
Choose the Aachen Chapel landmark to buff nearby units, or Meinwerk Palace for cheaper upgrades.
Keep gathering gold and food while the Feudal Age completes.
Build a Barracks slightly forward so your Men-at-Arms reach the enemy faster.
When you reach Feudal Age, research Men-at-Arms at the Barracks and start producing them.
Men-at-Arms are tough melee units that beat Spearmen and raid villagers well.
Send your first 3 to 4 Men-at-Arms to attack enemy villagers on an outer resource.
Use the Emergency Repairs or Inspired Warriors abilities if available to keep units healthy.
Keep producing Men-at-Arms and add a few Archers or Spearmen for support.
Research Blacksmith armor and weapon upgrades to make your Men-at-Arms even stronger.
If your attack is winning, keep the pressure on and delay aging up.
Otherwise, build your economy and prepare to advance to the Castle Age.
